events.headline: Israel faces multi-front war as Hezbollah breaks ceasefire and IRGC retaliates
events.details: Israel's security situation critically deteriorated. Hezbollah broke the November 2024 ceasefire on March 1, firing rockets at northern Israel. IRGC launched retaliatory strikes including a missile that hit a road in West Jerusalem. Military spending at 8.8% of GDP. Debt trend strong_growth. Political stability at -1.46 with budget deadline March 31. Three-front war: Gaza, Lebanon, Iran.
events.trigger: Active multi-front conflict; Hezbollah ceasefire collapse; IRGC retaliation

events.headline: UAE under direct Iranian missile attacks; Hormuz closure blocks oil/LNG exports
events.details: IRGC struck Al Dhafra Air Base and launched missiles at Dubai and Abu Dhabi. Aviation disrupted with 7,700+ delays. UAE closed Tehran embassy. Escalated from chokepoint exposure to direct military targeting.
events.trigger: IRGC struck Al Dhafra base; missiles hit Dubai and Abu Dhabi

events.headline: Qatar under direct Iranian attack on Al Udeid; Hormuz blocks LNG exports
events.details: IRGC struck Al Udeid Air Base. Hormuz closure blocks LNG exports. Escalated from chokepoint exposure to direct military targeting.
events.trigger: IRGC struck Al Udeid Air Base

events.headline: Kuwait under direct Iranian attack on Ali Al Salem; Hormuz blocks oil exports
events.details: IRGC struck Ali Al Salem Air Base. Hormuz closure blocks oil exports. Escalated from chokepoint exposure to direct military targeting.
events.trigger: IRGC struck Ali Al Salem Air Base

events.headline: Japan-China relations severely deteriorated: 50 companies sanctioned, rare earth controls
events.details: China sanctioned 50 Japanese companies on Feb 25 with rare earth export controls. Worst Japan-China bilateral moment in decades. GDP trend decrease. Military spending strong_growth.
events.trigger: China sanctions 50 Japanese companies; rare earth export controls

events.headline: India highly exposed to oil shock: imports 85% of oil via Hormuz-dependent routes
events.details: India imports ~85% of oil. Oil price surge adds cost-push inflation. Current account deficit widening. Rupee under pressure at 91.42/USD. GDP trend decrease but remains fastest major economy.
events.trigger: Oil shock exposure; CA deficit widening; inflation uptick

events.headline: Hezbollah breaks November 2024 ceasefire; fires rockets at northern Israel
events.details: Hezbollah broke ceasefire March 1. Israel now faces three-front war: Gaza, Lebanon, Iran.

events.headline: Argentina Senate approves landmark labor reform advancing Milei agenda
events.details: Senate approved labor reform 42-28 on Feb 27. Monthly inflation at 2.9%. GDP at 4.5%. Political stability improving. Positive structural development.
events.trigger: Major policy shift: labor reform passed

events.headline: US-Indonesia sign $33 billion trade agreement
events.details: US-Indonesia signed $33B trade deal Feb 19. Positions Indonesia as key US partner in SE Asia. FDI trend growth.

events.headline: Thailand PM Anutin forms coalition government
events.details: PM Anutin formed new coalition government Feb 13. Political transition with policy implications.

events.headline: US diplomatic relations strained by Iran strikes and tariff escalation
events.details: Spain PM condemned strikes. France, Russia, China called UNSC emergency session. Additional tariffs on China and Canada. Relations trend decrease.
events.trigger: Trend reversal in US relationship health

events.headline: Singapore trade hub faces shipping disruption from Hormuz crisis
events.details: Singapore (CA 17.5% GDP) faces shipping disruptions. GDP trend decrease. Political stability at 1.42 provides buffer.

events.headline: Pakistan domestic protests compound war crisis: 20 killed
events.details: 20 killed in protests over Iran strikes. Compounds war instability. Political stability at -1.93.

events.headline: Iran regime crisis and military conflict continue (ongoing)
events.details: Conditions persist. IRGC consolidating control. Succession crisis unresolved. Active military conflict with no ceasefire.

events.headline: Iran economic collapse trajectory continues (ongoing)
events.details: 8 of 11 factors at strong_decrease. Inflation 42.4% approaching hyperinflation. Uninvestable.

events.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan war continues (ongoing)
events.details: War continues. Political stability -1.93. Multiple strong_decrease trends. Protests compound instability.
